title: Updating skills & documentation
description: Batch of documentation-guide skill + framework-docs maintenance as conventions evolve. Delivered: layout-reference restructure, NN_/NNN_ notation + digit-width standard, the large issue-reference split into references/layouts/issues/, the agent-log typed-workspace standard, the new doc-agent skill, validator de-duplication onto a shared _check-lib.mjs, and the plugin version bump to 0.2.0. The NN_-in-URL exploration was decided against (stripped URLs stay canonical).
author: sidhantha
